name: Dead Session Hoodie
label: All Disciplines
desc: 400gsm French terry fleece. Double-lined hood. Kangaroo pocket. Front embroidered logo. Built for cold parking lot sessions.

name: Block Tee
label: Unisex
desc: Heavyweight 240gsm cotton tee. Oversized fit. Screen printed OpenBlock graphic. Pre-washed, pre-shrunk. Holds up.

name: Bail Pants
label: Skate / BMX
desc: Reinforced knees. Relaxed straight fit. 4-way stretch twill. Side zip pockets. Built for movement.

name: OB Vulc Low
label: Custom Shoes
desc: Hand-finished vulcanized sole. Custom OB colorway. Suede upper. Reinforced ollie area. Limited pairs per run.

name: Street Deck 8.25"
label: Custom Deck
desc: 7-ply Canadian maple. OB graphic pressed into the wood. Comes undrilled, ready to set up.

name: Snow Fleece Zip
label: Snow / Street
desc: Polar fleece zip-up. Reinforced shoulders. Drop tail back. Zippered chest pocket.

name: OB Logo Tee
label: Everyday
desc: Simple. Clean. The OB monogram on 200gsm cotton. Wear it every single day.

name: Drop #001 Hoodie
label: Limited — 50 pcs
desc: First ever OpenBlock limited drop. Hand-numbered. Screen printed on heavyweight fleece. Once gone, gone forever.

name: Wave Shorts
label: Surf / Skate
desc: Quick-dry recycled nylon. 20" outseam. Secure cargo pockets. Works in water and on concrete.

name: Graphic Deck
label: Artist Collab
desc: Artist collaboration deck. 7-ply maple. Full-bottom graphic. Limited print run. Ride it or hang it.

name: 5-Panel Cap
label: Accessories
desc: Structured 5-panel. Flat brim. Adjustable snapback. Embroidered OB flag. One size.

name: OB Vulc High
label: Custom Shoes
desc: High-top version of the OB Vulc. Padded ankle collar. Waxed canvas upper. Built for cold sessions.
